Off Calendar Jan-14-2002 Set For Trial On Apr-29-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for defendant. No appearance by plaintiff or on behalf of plaintiff. Court ordered Defendant Enviroclean, Inc. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Mary J. Hinds. (212)
